# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0
parameters:
  servicePrincipalDisplayName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: The display name for the Azure AD Application/Service Principal.
    defaultValue: ci-cd-pipeline-sp

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.AAD/applications@2021-04-01
    name: '[parameters(''servicePrincipalDisplayName'')]' # Use the display name as the ARM resource name for clarity
    properties:
      displayName: '[parameters(''servicePrincipalDisplayName'')]'
      signInAudience: AzureADMyOrg # Specifies that the application is registered in your tenant only
    location: global # Azure AD resources are generally global
    sku: Basic # Required property for AAD applications

  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments@2022-04-01
    name: '[guid(subscription().id, parameters(''servicePrincipalDisplayName''), ''contributor'')]' # Unique GUID for the role assignment
    scope: '[subscription().id]' # Assign at the subscription level
    dependsOn:
      - '[parameters(''servicePrincipalDisplayName'')]'
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: '[concat(subscription().id, ''/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c'')]' # Contributor Role Definition ID
      principalId: '[reference(parameters(''servicePrincipalDisplayName'')).objectId]' # Object ID of the created Service Principal
      principalType: ServicePrincipal # Specifies the type of principal being assigned the role

outputs:
  servicePrincipalAppId:
    type: string
    value: '[reference(parameters(''servicePrincipalDisplayName'')).appId]' # The Application ID (client ID)
    metadata:
      description: The Application ID (client ID) of the created Service Principal. Use this for authentication.
  servicePrincipalObjectId:
    type: string
    value: '[reference(parameters(''servicePrincipalDisplayName'')).objectId]' # The Azure AD Object ID of the Service Principal
    metadata:
      description: The Azure AD Object ID of the created Service Principal.
